raw:
{ 
  "perspective": "Atlas, the project itself", 
  "position": "for", 
  "argument": "First, Atlas should verify the 83(b) election status to prevent duplicate filing and $150 loss as in Class 19. Second, Atlas should apply for an ITIN to unlock business operations. Third, Atlas should activate Stripe Atlas perks for incorporation benefits.", 
  "strongest_counter": "Some may argue that setting up a Mercury bank account should be the top priority for immediate business operations, but this can be done in parallel with verifying the 83(b) status and applying for an ITIN, which have more severe consequences if delayed or done incorrectly.", 
  "evidence_cited": "Class 19 in memory/atlas/lessons.md, Stripe Atlas documentation, IRS guidelines on ITIN and 83(b) election", 
  "whistleblower_flag": "null" 
}
argument: First, Atlas should verify the 83(b) election status to prevent duplicate filing and $150 loss as in Class 19. Second, Atlas should apply for an ITIN to unlock business operations. Third, Atlas should activate Stripe Atlas perks for incorporation benefits.
strongest_counter: Some may argue that setting up a Mercury bank account should be the top priority for immediate business operations, but this can be done in parallel with verifying the 83(b) status and applying for an ITIN, which have more severe consequences if delayed or done incorrectly.
evidence_cited: Class 19 in memory/atlas/lessons.md, Stripe Atlas documentation, IRS guidelines on ITIN and 83(b) election
